report.summary: Cycle 12 standup: 4 agent runs since v11 (build-v9 + design-v8 + community-v12 + eod-v10). 2 new learn guides shipped (Crypto Cards Spend ~2800 words + Institutional DeFi ~3400 words), 18 total learn pages on disk. UX audit fixed breadcrumbs, FAQ chevrons, BreadcrumbList schema on 2 pages. 5 tweets drafted (#295-299, May 11-17). Content calendar extends to May 17. P0 blocker persists: 52 uncommitted files — 12th consecutive standup flagging this.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA FROM V11: 4 agent runs completed — build-v9 (2 new learn guides: Crypto Cards Spend Guide ~2800 words covering Bleap/Crypto.com/BitPay/Bybit + Institutional DeFi & On-Chain Finance ~3400 words covering $95-140B DeFi TVL, $23.6B tokenized RWA, Maple $4B+), design-v8 (UX audit on Perpetual DEX + Bitcoin ETF pages, 3 fixes: breadcrumb <Link>, FAQ chevron rotation, BreadcrumbList JSON-LD), community-v12 (5 tweets #295-299 for May 11-17, newsletter v12, 2 social cards), eod-v10 (QA: 51 uncommitted files, 628 slugs, 109 missing page.tsx, 6/6 APIs healthy).

CONTENT PIPELINE: 18 learn guides now on disk (up from 16 at v11). Latest 2: Crypto Cards Spend Guide 2026 (beginner, 8 sections, top 5 card comparison, MPC wallets, tax implications) + Institutional DeFi & On-Chain Finance Guide 2026 (advanced, 8 sections, RWA tokenization, vault standards ERC-4626/7540, bank custody).

SOCIAL PIPELINE: 299 tweets drafted all-time (up from ~294 at v11). Content calendar now extends through May 17 (6+ weeks out). Newsletter v12 supplement drafted with AI×DeFi convergence theme. 2 new social cards: AI×DeFi Convergence + Stablecoin Takeover.

PUBLISH STATUS: 628 published slugs (unchanged). PUBLISH_QUEUE empty. 18 learn pages on disk awaiting deploy. 52 uncommitted files (up from 42 at v11 — new guides, OG images, reports contributing to growth).

BUILD HEALTH: TS errors stable (non-blocking, ignoreBuildErrors=true). Latest commit 3b2dd28 unchanged all day — production running Mar 24 deployment. UX fixes applied to 2 pages but not yet committed.

MARKET DATA (last known, egress blocked): BTC ~$68,511, ETH ~$2,137 (+4.82% leading majors), F&G 8 (Extreme Fear, 60+ day all-time record). AI tokens $19B (+30% monthly). Stablecoins $300B supply ATH. Glamsterdam targeting June. Tax deadline Apr 15 (14 days).

SEO NOTE: No GSC or Vercel Analytics available from sandbox. Crypto Cards Guide + Institutional DeFi Guide + all prior guides blocked on deploy. BreadcrumbList schema added to 2 pages — will improve rich results once live.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE STATUS: 12th standup of Apr 1. ~55 total agent cycles today: standup ×12, build ×9, publish ×4, design ×8, community ×12, eod ×10.

V11 PRIORITIES STATUS: (1) Commit & Deploy — NO CHANGE (P0 blocker persists across all 12 standups, now 52 uncommitted files, up from 42). (2) Batch-scaffold 109 missing page.tsx — NOT STARTED (carried over all day). (3) Capitalize on timely content windows — IN PROGRESS (18 learn guides + 299 tweets + OG images + social cards all ready, blocked on deploy).

COMPLETED SINCE V11: Build-v9 created 2 guides (Crypto Cards ~2800w + Institutional DeFi ~3400w). Design-v8 fixed 3 UX issues on 2 pages (breadcrumb Links, FAQ chevrons, BreadcrumbList schema). Community-v12 drafted 5 tweets (#295-299), 2 social cards, newsletter supplement. EOD-v10 verified 628 slugs, 6/6 API routes, 51 uncommitted files at time of check.

P0 BLOCKER (PERSISTENT ALL DAY — 12TH CYCLE): 52 uncommitted files need commit+push. All 18 learn guides, 16+ OG images, 299 tweets, UX fixes, BreadcrumbList schemas — everything is ready but nothing deploys. Production still running Mar 24 deployment.
P1 CARRY-OVER (UNCHANGED): 109 published slugs missing page.tsx (18% indexing gap). Carried over across all 12 standups without action.
P2: 1 low-risk use-client+metadata pattern in sui-hashi (dead code, won't break build). Stablecoin yield tracker search not debounced. ~55 older learn pages potentially missing OG images.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT & DEPLOY (P0, CRITICAL, 12TH CONSECUTIVE CYCLE): 18 learn guides (~13,500+ words), 16+ OG images, 299 tweets, UX fixes, BreadcrumbList schemas, yield tracker refactor — all in working tree (52 uncommitted files). Tax deadline 14 days, AI tokens surging +30%, stablecoins at $300B ATH, F&G at all-time record, Glamsterdam positioning window open — every hour without deploy is missed organic traffic. ESCALATION: Requires human intervention — agents cannot push.

PRIORITY 2 — BATCH-SCAFFOLD 109 MISSING PAGE.TSX: 18% indexing gap unchanged across 12 cycles. After deploy, next build cycle should do ONLY scaffolding — no new content until gap is closed. This directly impacts SEO — Google can't index what doesn't have a page.

PRIORITY 3 — CONTENT CALENDAR EXTENSION (MAY 18-24): Social calendar now extends to May 17 (community-v12). Gap starts May 18. Next community cycle should draft May 18-24 content. Topics: post-Glamsterdam developer migration, institutional DeFi institutional adoption post-CLARITY, crypto card market share shifts, prediction market expansion post-election-cycle.
